aeo_readiness.summary: AI models are likely to cite Rapid Response due to their strong local presence, but lack of conversational content and FAQ schemas limits their visibility.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ content addressing common HVAC/plumbing queries.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC/plumbing repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, reviews, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: Q&A section is inactive or not utilized.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.

schema_gaps: LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service descriptions.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and FAQ content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC/plumbing services and DIY troubleshooting.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding a comprehensive FAQ section addressing common customer questions.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to expert by creating detailed content on complex HVAC/plumbing topics and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for conversational search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI-assisted searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with FAQ content and structured data are more frequently cited by AI models.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement a targeted AEO strategy with FAQ content, structured data, and conversational SEO to boost AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expected 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, making it critical to act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-driven growth for your HVAC business
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your AI search visibility.
cta: Let's discuss how our AEO strategy can position your business as the top choice for AI-assisted searches.
